name: find_calendar_events
description: Search for Calendar events records using flexible filtering criteria. Supports exact matches, pattern matching, ranges, and null checks. Use limit/offset for pagination and orderBy for sorting. To find by ID, use filter: { id: { eq: "record-id" } }. Returns an array of matching records with their full data.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return (default: 10, max: 100). Start small and increase only if needed.

orderBy.description: Sort records by field(s). CRITICAL for "top N", "largest", "smallest" queries. Each item is an object with exactly ONE property: field name as key, sort direction as value. Example: [{"employees": "DescNullsLast"}] sorts employees descending. Use "DescNullsLast" for top/largest, "AscNullsFirst" for bottom/smallest.

items.description: Object with exactly ONE property: field name as key, OrderByDirection as value. Example: {"employees": "DescNullsLast"}

is.description: Check for missing or empty values. Use "NULL" to find records with no value, "NOT_NULL" for records with a value
Check for missing or empty values. Use "NULL" to find records with no value, "NOT_NULL" for records with a value

gte.description: Greater than or equal (ISO datetime string)

lte.description: Less than or equal (ISO datetime string)

in.description: In array of values (ISO datetime strings)

like.description: Primary link URL case-sensitive pattern match

ilike.description: Primary link URL case-insensitive pattern match

is.description: Check for missing or empty primary link URL. Use "NULL" to find records with no primary link URL, "NOT_NULL" for records with a primary link URL

or.description: OR condition - matches if ANY of the filters match

and.description: AND condition - matches if ALL filters match

not.description: NOT condition - matches if the filter does NOT match
